home.hero.headline:
Welcome to
The *Hous.*
home.hero.sub: Not a platform. A building with rooms.

cards.p: The editorial photography studio the Hous was built around. Portraits, grad, prom, and commercial, from $135.
The frames that earned their place. A working sample of recent editorial sessions.
Complete creative direction packages — mood board, shot list, lighting, grade, styling. Three proven packages, open now from $29.
A real day in a working creative's life, documented twice a month. Real people, real days, real work.
The room and the people in it, shot with the same eye. Listings, storefronts, and headshots across the Triad.
Editorial websites for small businesses and brands, built like editorials, not templates. Blueprint $500, builds from $2,000.
Echoes of Tomorrow — the debut EP — is out now. Play it here, or anywhere you stream.
Send the brief, get a track built around your content — not pulled from a library. Custom sound by SolHous Records.

home.firstwords.quote: The first galleries are being made right now. When the words come, they'll arrive unedited, in the client's own voice — or they won't arrive at all. We'd rather show you an honest blank than a borrowed quote.

work.hero.eyebrow: Studio Hous · Selected Work · Greensboro NC
work.hero.headline:
Every image earns
its *place.*
work.hero.sub: Editorial direction, premium editing, a curated gallery. The same eye on every session — a graduation portrait or a brand shoot.

sessions.hero.headline:
Sessions start
at *$135.*
sessions.hero.sub: Every session includes real creative direction, premium editing, and a gallery that's curated, not dumped — every frame one we'd stand behind. You'll know the scope and the price before you put anything down.

cards.p: Fast, clean listing photography with the same editorial eye. MLS-ready galleries.
Brand and organizational imagery — product, team, and space, quoted to your scope.

sessions.events.intro: Weddings, corporate events, and the celebrations in between. The same editorial eye, working a room instead of a set: the planned frames on the run of show, and the ones nobody planned that end up mattering more.

cards.p: Coverage built around your timeline, not a shot-list template. Direction where it helps, invisibility where it counts, and a gallery curated like an editorial.
cards.meta: Quoted per wedding · dates hold with a deposit

cards.p: Conferences, galas, launches, retreats, and the parties worth remembering. Keynotes, candids, details, and the room itself — delivered ready for your channels.
cards.meta: Quoted to your run of show · let's talk

sessions.events.held: Every event is scoped on a call first: hours of coverage, the moments that cannot be missed, and delivery timeline. You'll have the whole number before you hold the date.

field-notes.hero.headline: Field *Notes.*
field-notes.hero.sub: Some stories take a day. Some stories take a season. All of them are worth the time it takes to get them right.
field-notes.hero.intro: Field Notes is a biweekly, long-form, day-in-the-life editorial series documenting working creatives — photographers, designers, founders, students, audio engineers, muralists, art teachers — across the Greensboro creative middle class and beyond. Numbered issues. A permanent archive. Published by Studio Hous, under SolHous.

items.name: Final Touches
items.pitch: The grad photo everyone takes, directed like the night it actually was. One hallway, sixteen frames.

items.name: Dockside
items.pitch: Shoot summer like it owes you nothing. Four setups, the hardest light of the day made the point.

items.name: Downtown Is the Runway
items.pitch: Six blocks, one subject, no studio. The city does the set design. Twenty frames, gold into blue hour.

spaces.hero.headline:
The studio for agents and owners
who refuse to look like *everyone else.*
spaces.hero.sub: We photograph the room, and the people who live and work in it, with the same eye.

spaces.pricing.includes: Storefronts from $250 · Listings from $175 · Agents from $225 · Development quoted to scope

cats.name: The Storefront
cats.blurb: The room your customers walk into, photographed the way it actually feels at the good hour.

tiers.small: Half-day · interior + product + owner/team portraits + 3 vertical clips

cats.note: I shoot during your slow hours so it never touches service.

cats.name: The Listing
cats.blurb: Your property, read for light before it's read for square footage.

tiers.small: Up to 1,500 sqft · 25–30 photos · next day by noon
1,500–2,500 sqft · 35–45 photos · next day by noon

cats.name: The Agent
cats.blurb: You, on your own listing. Personal branding that matches the work, so the face and the houses finally look like one practice.

development.p: Commercial spaces and ground-up projects. Scope is the conversation.

spaces.pricing.held: Listing add-ons: Twilight exterior $150 · 3D tour $150 · 2D floor plan $59 ($49 with 3D) · Agent video walkthrough $425 · Virtual staging $40/room · Object removal $20/image. All prices plus NC sales tax.

hous-sites.position.headline:
Built like editorials,
not *templates.*
hous-sites.position.body: Most small-business sites come off a template shelf and look like it. Hous Sites treats your website like an editorial: direction first, then design, then a build you can live in without a developer on retainer.

cards.name: Hous Blueprint
cards.season: Paid discovery · every build starts here
cards.blurb: A discovery sprint that ends in a plan you own, whether or not we build it.

tiers.small: 60-min call · editorial direction memo · sitemap · fixed quote

cards.note: 100% credited toward your build within 30 days.

cards.name: Hous Editorial
cards.blurb: Editorial-grade design for the business that needs one site done right.

tiers.small: up to 5 pages · contact form + SEO

cards.name: Hous Flagship
cards.blurb: The larger build: collections, booking or commerce-lite, and imagery treated with the studio's eye.

tiers.small: up to 10 pages · CMS collections · booking or commerce-lite

hous-sites.builds.held: The Blueprint ends in a fixed quote. The number you sign is the number you pay, and the $500 comes off it when you build within 30 days.

hous-sites.panel.headline:
You hold the words.
We hold the *taste.*
hous-sites.panel.body: The Hous Panel is a white-label dashboard you can add to either build for $500. Your hours, your announcements, your words and images, editable by you in the browser at any hour. The layout, the type, the spacing, the color: locked. The client controls content; the studio controls taste. Skip it, and we make your changes for you inside your care plan's included time.
hous-sites.panel.promise: You can't break it. We made sure.

cards.p: Hosting, backups, monitoring, 30 minutes of assistance each month, a quarterly editorial check-in on the words, and the Hous Panel where you've added it.
Everything in Hous Care, plus 2 hours of design work each month, a seasonal refresh each quarter, a traffic snapshot, and 48-hour priority.

hous-sites.care.held: After the included 90 days, care continues month to month on the card on file. Cancel any time with 30 days' notice, and your site and content export with you.
